allow: Bash(# Simulator crash logs are in a different location find ~/Library/Developer/CoreSimulator/Devices/769AB144-4508-40EC-B76A-E03BC7485535/data/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/ -name ""*.ips"" -o -name ""*.crash"")

Bash(# First check if Xcode logs show any clue when we build with -showBuildTimingSummary # Actually, let''s look at what RCTAppDelegate.loadReactNativeWindow does with the window # We confirmed _window is used directly in RCTAppDelegate.mm # Check if EXAppDelegateWrapper redeclares window find /Users/burakaltintas/Documents/bankaci-kredi-hesaplama-app/ios/Pods -path ""*/expo-modules-core/*"" -name ""EXAppDelegateWrapper.h"" | xargs grep -n ''window\\|UIWindow'')
Bash(# Check what''s actually in the compiled app - look at Xcode build products ls ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/kredihesaplama-*/Build/Products/Release-iphonesimulator/)
Bash(# What does expo prebuild generate? Check the prebuild template find /Users/burakaltintas/Documents/bankaci-kredi-hesaplama-app/node_modules -name ""bare-workflow"" -type d)
